# T&M Consultants (T&M Co.)

> UK-registered AI consultancy (Company No. 12621485) building AI voice
> agents, RAG systems and workflow automation, with Fractional CTO and
> full-stack product delivery for start-ups and SMEs. Offices in London,
> UK and Faisalabad, Pakistan. 10+ years experience, 29+ projects shipped.
>
> For full service detail, every FAQ and all case studies, see the expanded
> catalog: [/llms-full.txt](https://tnmco.uk/llms-full.txt)

## Services
- [AI Agents & Assistants](https://tnmco.uk/services/ai-agents/): voice agents and assistants; live demos VIOLET (clinic) and BiteBot (restaurant)
- [AI Automation & RAG](https://tnmco.uk/services/ai-automation/): RAG pipelines, LLM apps, n8n/Python workflow automation
- [Fractional CTO](https://tnmco.uk/services/fractional-cto/): architecture, technical leadership, delivery management
- [Software Delivery](https://tnmco.uk/services/software-delivery/): full-stack web, mobile, e-commerce, MVP development

## Case Studies
- [IqbalAI](https://tnmco.uk/case-studies/iqbalai/): AI-first Urdu education platform; LangGraph + Qdrant + FastAPI; ~70% cost reduction
- [CaptureProof](https://tnmco.uk/case-studies/captureproof/): medical computer-vision models; 99.99% AWS uptime over 3 years; HIPAA-aligned hosting
- [Atlas](https://tnmco.uk/case-studies/atlas/): real-time AI copilot with RAG analytics; <1.5s natural-language report latency
- [OTTO](https://tnmco.uk/case-studies/otto/): autonomous AI agent for live blockchain + social channels, built on Pydantic AI
- [Docushield](https://tnmco.uk/case-studies/docushield/): blockchain document verification; client raised $0.5M seed
- [All case studies](https://tnmco.uk/case-studies/)

- [BiteBot — Restaurant AI Assistant](https://bitebot.tnmco.uk/)
